message:
feat(e2e): tool inventory and setup readiness E2E tests

Add E2E test suite validating tool detection API (structured results,
cache bypass), health readiness probes (build info, capabilities,
component checks, dependency diagnostics), setup page UI (tool cards,
progress indicators, no console errors), dashboard tool health display,
and cross-page navigation flow with screenshot capture.

15 tests with full logging framework diagnostics.

Closes bd-2n73.18

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
